accepted_human_dispositions.notes: Accepted from targeted VLM visual review evidence. This is a VLM-assisted visual disposition for source legibility, question boundary, diagram presence, and cross-page continuity only; it is not authority alignment or production-ready approval. VLM notes: Single-page question; full question text and answer space present; watermark does not impair legibility or question integrity. Red footer note is non-intrusive and does not affect question content.

Accepted from targeted VLM visual review evidence. This is a VLM-assisted visual disposition for source legibility, question boundary, diagram presence, and cross-page continuity only; it is not authority alignment or production-ready approval. VLM notes: Single crop stack contains full question (2a and 2b) with clear text and required continuation; watermark present but does not impair legibility or question integrity.

Operator override: targeted VLM rejected only because a watermarked_source_pdf was present. VLM accepted question boundary=true, diagram presence=true, cross-page continuity=n/a. The watermarked-shard contract treats a watermark as a review reason, not an automatic blocker, when the question is complete and legible and the watermark does not occlude required content. Original VLM notes: Watermark present at bottom: '老师微信 : liuxue119118 (题目有修改过，请加微信确认是否完整，以免影响您的学习！)'. This violates the 'watermarked_source_pdf' review reason. Visual legibility, question boundary, and diagram presence are otherwise acceptable (no diagram required; question fully contained; text legible), but watermark constitutes a blocker per instructions.
